title: AuraFault 16x
description: A fast, clean, and competitive 16x PvP pack designed for Bedwars players on Minecraft 1.8.9.
body:
# AuraFault 16x - Bedwars PvP Pack

AuraFault 16x is a clean and stylish Minecraft PvP texture pack designed for Bedwars and competitive gameplay on version 1.8.9.

The pack focuses on smooth visuals, better PvP visibility, and FPS-friendly textures while keeping a modern competitive aesthetic.

---
[![Discord server link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2334cf3eb4b13ee2695bae533f8044f6237efd83.png)](https://discord.gg/wQRgkY77bJ)
## ✨ Features

- Clean 16x PvP textures
- FPS Friendly
- Short Swords
- Bedwars Optimized
- Custom GUI
- Smooth gameplay experience
- Competitive PvP style

---

## 📦 Information

- Version: 1.8.9
- Resolution: 16x
- Category: PvP / Bedwars

---

## 📥 Installation

1. Download the texture pack
2. Open Minecraft
3. Go to Resource Packs
4. Open Resource Pack Folder
5. Drag the ZIP file into the folder
6. Enable the pack in-game

---

## ⚠ Notes

- OptiFine is recommended
- Best used for Bedwars and competitive PvP servers
- To see the Textured Sky

---

## 📜 Terms of Use

- Do not repost this pack without permission
- Do not claim this pack as your own
- Credit is appreciated if edited or showcased

---

## ❤️ Support
